title: Didyplosandra andersonii

The plant is native to Australia and is a part of the family of plants known as the club mosses. Further classification of the plant includes its rank as an evergreen shrub. Its classification also includes the family Dasypogonaceae which is a part of the larger group of plants known as the lycopods.
